questionHtml: Outline the reason for plasma insulin levels changing in the first 30 minutes of the test.
markschemeHtml:
as blood glucose rises, insulin rises/increases to reduce the level/OWTTE;

Blood glucose must be mentioned as well as a rise in insulin.

meta.title: Outline the reason for plasma insulin levels changing in the first 30 minutes of the test.
breadcrumbLabels: D3.3.3. Regulation of blood glucose as an example of the role of hormones in homeostasis
